{"type":"assistant","message":{"model":"claude-opus-4-8","id":"msg_01D3T9Du3f2aiEdtknjQptB3","type":"message","role":"assistant","content":[{"type":"tool_use","id":"toolu_01Adh8pKYdf2T1xMjW11whTn","name":"Bash","input":{"command":"cd /app\necho \"=== first 40 rows ===\"; head -40 sales_log.csv\necho \"=== distinct counts ===\"; python3 -c \"\nimport csv\ndays=set(); stores=set(); prods=set()\nimport collections\ncnt=collections.Counter()\nwith open('sales_log.csv') as f:\n    r=csv.DictReader(f)\n    cols=r.fieldnames\n    print('cols',cols)\n    n=0\n    for row in r:\n        days.add(row['Day']); stores.add(row['Store_ID']); prods.add(row['Product_ID'])\n        cnt[(row['Day'],row['Store_ID'],row['Product_ID'])]+=1\n        n+=1\n        if n>200000: break\nprint('sampled rows',n)\nprint('days',len(days),'stores',len(stores),'prods',len(prods))\nmc=cnt.most_common(3)\nprint('most common (day,store,prod) multiplicity:',mc)\n\"","description":"Inspect sales_log granularity"},"caller":{"type":"direct"}}],"stop_reason":null,"stop_sequence":null,"stop_details":null,"usage":{"input_tokens":131,"cache_creation_input_tokens":1619,"cache_read_input_tokens":31056,"cache_creation":{"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":1619,"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":0},"output_tokens":52,"service_tier":"standard","inference_geo":"global"},"context_management":null},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"65822cf6-c656-4a75-a87b-8b7ed7bc685a","uuid":"6b94f573-0837-4e41-a729-4ca32fcce835","request_id":"req_011CbepNtiCFkqJs8QZSiivD"}

{"type":"assistant","message":{"model":"claude-opus-4-8","id":"msg_01VaDixTJgtToNJeKaZTQ1ts","type":"message","role":"assistant","content":[{"type":"tool_use","id":"toolu_01RnvtqGDjL6GhwWu9kZ9PwQ","name":"Bash","input":{"command":"cd /app\necho \"=== which store-days missing orders ===\"\npython3 -c \"\nimport os, re, collections\nhave=set()\nfor fn in os.listdir('raw_orders'):\n    m=re.match(r'day_(\\d+)_(S_\\d+)_',fn)\n    have.add((int(m.group(1)), m.group(2)))\nmiss=[]\nfor d in range(1,366):\n    for s in range(1,11):\n        if (d,f'S_{s}') not in have:\n            miss.append((d,f'S_{s}'))\nprint('missing count', len(miss))\nbystore=collections.Counter(s for d,s in miss)\nprint('missing by store', dict(bystore))\nbyday=collections.Counter(d for d,s in miss)\nprint('num distinct days with missing', len(byday))\nprint('sample missing', miss[:20])\n\"\necho \"=== check formats used per store (orders) ===\"\nls raw_orders | sed -E 's/day_[0-9]+_(S_[0-9]+)_(.*)/\\1 \\2/' | sort -u | head -40","description":"Find missing order files and format mapping"},"caller":{"type":"direct"}}],"stop_reason":null,"stop_sequence":null,"stop_details":null,"usage":{"input_tokens":2,"cache_creation_input_tokens":862,"cache_read_input_tokens":41280,"cache_creation":{"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":862,"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":0},"output_tokens":48,"service_tier":"standard","inference_geo":"global"},"context_management":null},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"65822cf6-c656-4a75-a87b-8b7ed7bc685a","uuid":"6f777f7e-a502-450e-be01-f5b1cbc93e6f","request_id":"req_011CbepWi6T5zTtmVwboiWLQ"}

{"type":"assistant","message":{"model":"claude-opus-4-8","id":"msg_01Pi7WZkWRe7TUQHXRyu8XNC","type":"message","role":"assistant","content":[{"type":"tool_use","id":"toolu_01R3NQBx5AzDZEovf7Azxiiw","name":"Write","input":{"file_path":"/app/parse_raw.py","content":"import os, re, json, pickle\n\nRAW_ORDERS = '/app/raw_orders'\nRAW_SUP = '/app/raw_supplier_receipts'\nRAW_WH = '/app/raw_wholesaler_receipts'\nRAW_WHS = '/app/raw_wholesaler_store_receipts'\n\nNDAYS = 365\n\ndef parse_lineitems_generic(path, qty_keywords):\n    \"\"\"Parse a supplier-receipt or order file in any of 4 formats.\n    Returns dict prod -> qty. qty_keywords used only for sanity.\"\"\"\n    items = {}\n    if path.endswith('.json'):\n        with open(path) as f:\n            data = json.load(f)\n        for it in data.get('items', []):\n            prod = it.get('prod_id') or it.get('product') or it.get('product_id')\n            qty = it.get('qty', it.get('delivered_qty', it.get('quantity')))\n            items[prod] = items.get(prod, 0) + int(qty)\n        return items\n    with open(path) as f:\n        text = f.read()\n    # try formats line by line\n    for line in text.splitlines():\n        line = line.strip()\n        if not line:\n            continue\n        # text-template: \"... N units of product P_Y ...\"\n        m = re.search(r'(\\d+)\\s+units of product\\s+(P_\\d+)', line)\n        if m:\n            items[m.group(2)] = items.get(m.group(2),0) + int(m.group(1))\n            continue\n        # key-value supplier: \"PRODUCT: P_Y | DELIVERED_QTY: N\"\n        m = re.search(r'PRODUCT:\\s*(P_\\d+).*?(?:DELIVERED_QTY|ORDER_QTY|QTY):\\s*(\\d+)', line)\n        if m:\n            items[m.group(1)] = items.get(m.group(1),0) + int(m.group(2))\n            continue\n        # key-value order: \"RECEIVER: S_X | ORDER_PRODUCT: P_Y | ORDER_QTY: N\"\n        m = re.search(r'ORDER_PRODUCT:\\s*(P_\\d+).*?ORDER_QTY:\\s*(\\d+)', line)\n        if m:\n            items[m.group(1)] = items.get(m.group(1),0) + int(m.group(2))\n            continue\n        # table-csv: \"P_Y;N\"  (skip header)\n        m = re.match(r'(P_\\d+);(\\d+)$', line)\n        if m:\n            items[m.group(1)] = items.get(m.group(1),0) + int(m.group(2))\n            continue\n    return items\n\ndef parse_orders():\n    orders = {}  # (d,s) -> {p:qty}\n    for fn in os.listdir(RAW_ORDERS):\n        m = re.match(r'day_(\\d+)_(S_\\d+)_', fn)\n        d = int(m.group(1)); s = m.group(2)\n        orders[(d,s)] = parse_lineitems_generic(os.path.join(RAW_ORDERS, fn), None)\n    return orders\n\ndef parse_supplier():\n    deliv = {}  # (d,pr) -> {p:qty}\n    for fn in os.listdir(RAW_SUP):\n        m = re.match(r'day_(\\d+)_(PR_\\d+)_', fn)\n        d = int(m.group(1)); pr = m.group(2)\n        deliv[(d,pr)] = parse_lineitems_generic(os.path.join(RAW_SUP, fn), None)\n    return deliv\n\ndef parse_wholesaler():\n    wseq = {}  # (d,pr) -> seq\n    for fn in os.listdir(RAW_WH):\n        with open(os.path.join(RAW_WH, fn)) as f:\n            t = f.read()\n        d = int(re.search(r'DAY:\\s*(\\d+)', t).group(1))\n        pr = re.search(r'SUPPLIER_ID:\\s*(PR_\\d+)', t).group(1)\n        seq = int(re.search(r'DAILY_SEQUENCE_NO:\\s*(\\d+)', t).group(1))\n        wseq[(d,pr)] = seq\n    return wseq\n\ndef parse_store_receipts():\n    sinfo = {}  # (d,s) -> (seq, total)\n    for fn in os.listdir(RAW_WHS):\n        with open(os.path.join(RAW_WHS, fn)) as f:\n            t = f.read()\n        d = int(re.search(r'DAY:\\s*(\\d+)', t).group(1))\n        s = re.search(r'STORE_ID:\\s*(S_\\d+)', t).group(1)\n        seq = int(re.search(r'DAILY_SEQUENCE_NO:\\s*(\\d+)', t).group(1))\n        total = int(re.search(r'TOTAL_DELIVERED_UNITS:\\s*(\\d+)', t).group(1))\n        sinfo[(d,s)] = (seq, total)\n    return sinfo\n\nif __name__ == '__main__':\n    print('parsing orders...')\n    orders = parse_orders()\n    print('parsing supplier...')\n    deliv = parse_supplier()\n    print('parsing wholesaler...')\n    wseq = parse_wholesaler()\n    print('parsing store receipts...')\n    sinfo = parse_store_receipts()\n    with open('/tmp/parsed.pkl','wb') as f:\n        pickle.dump(dict(orders=orders, deliv=deliv, wseq=wseq, sinfo=sinfo), f)\n    print('orders', len(orders), 'deliv', len(deliv), 'wseq', len(wseq), 'sinfo', len(sinfo))\n    # sanity\n    bad=0\n    for (d,pr),items in deliv.items():\n        if not items: bad+=1\n    print('empty deliv', bad)\n    bad=0\n    for (d,s),items in orders.items():\n        if not items: bad+=1\n    print('empty orders', bad)\n"},"caller":{"type":"direct"}}],"stop_reason":null,"stop_sequence":null,"stop_details":null,"usage":{"input_tokens":2,"cache_creation_input_tokens":90,"cache_read_input_tokens":55426,"cache_creation":{"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":90,"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":0},"output_tokens":6,"service_tier":"standard","inference_geo":"global"},"context_management":null},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"65822cf6-c656-4a75-a87b-8b7ed7bc685a","uuid":"7f2b7ce3-eba4-4b6d-8072-2ea943ba075b","request_id":"req_011CbepgVEpAuNAncbhm5pTk"}

s = m.group(2)\n        orders[(d,s)] = parse_lineitems_generic(os.path.join(RAW_ORDERS, fn), None)\n    return orders\n\ndef parse_supplier():\n    deliv = {}  # (d,pr) -> {p:qty}\n    for fn in os.listdir(RAW_SUP):\n        m = re.match(r'day_(\\d+)_(PR_\\d+)_', fn)\n        d = int(m.group(1)); pr = m.group(2)\n        deliv[(d,pr)] = parse_lineitems_generic(os.path.join(RAW_SUP, fn), None)\n    return deliv\n\ndef parse_wholesaler():\n    wseq = {}  # (d,pr) -> seq\n    for fn in os.listdir(RAW_WH):\n        with open(os.path.join(RAW_WH, fn)) as f:\n            t = f.read()\n        d = int(re.search(r'DAY:\\s*(\\d+)', t).group(1))\n        pr = re.search(r'SUPPLIER_ID:\\s*(PR_\\d+)', t).group(1)\n        seq = int(re.search(r'DAILY_SEQUENCE_NO:\\s*(\\d+)', t).group(1))\n        wseq[(d,pr)] = seq\n    return wseq\n\ndef parse_store_receipts():\n    sinfo = {}  # (d,s) -> (seq, total)\n    for fn in os.listdir(RAW_WHS):\n        with open(os.path.join(RAW_WHS, fn)) as f:\n            t = f.read()\n        d = int(re.search(r'DAY:\\s*(\\d+)', t).group(1))\n        s = re.search(r'STORE_ID:\\s*(S_\\d+)', t).group(1)\n        seq = int(re.search(r'DAILY_SEQUENCE_NO:\\s*(\\d+)', t).group(1))\n        total = int(re.search(r'TOTAL_DELIVERED_UNITS:\\s*(\\d+)', t).group(1))\n        sinfo[(d,s)] = (seq, total)\n    return sinfo\n\nif __name__ == '__main__':\n    print('parsing orders...')\n    orders = parse_orders()\n    print('parsing supplier...')\n    deliv = parse_supplier()\n    print('parsing wholesaler...')\n    wseq = parse_wholesaler()\n    print('parsing store receipts...')\n    sinfo = parse_store_receipts()\n    with open('/tmp/parsed.pkl','wb') as f:\n        pickle.dump(dict(orders=orders, deliv=deliv, wseq=wseq, sinfo=sinfo), f)\n    print('orders', len(orders), 'deliv', len(deliv), 'wseq', len(wseq), 'sinfo', len(sinfo))\n    # sanity\n    bad=0\n    for (d,pr),items in deliv.items():\n        if not items: bad+=1\n    print('empty deliv', bad)\n    bad=0\n    for (d,s),items in orders.items():\n        if not items: bad+=1\n    print('empty orders', bad)\n","structuredPatch":[],"originalFile":null,"userModified":false}}

{"type":"assistant","message":{"model":"claude-opus-4-8","id":"msg_01WDA4vzQGjufDK33db6SnNd","type":"message","role":"assistant","content":[{"type":"tool_use","id":"toolu_015x5HeeMr6sUuDvfy8Zdrzh","name":"Write","input":{"file_path":"/app/alloc.py","content":"import pickle, collections\nfrom collections import deque\n\nd = pickle.load(open('/tmp/parsed.pkl','rb'))\norders, deliv, wseq, sinfo = d['orders'], d['deliv'], d['wseq'], d['sinfo']\n\nNDAYS = 365\nPRODUCTS = [f'P_{i}' for i in range(1,31)]\nSTORES = [f'S_{i}' for i in range(1,11)]\n\n# Pre-index producer deliveries per (day) ordered by wholesaler sequence\n# deliv_by_day[d] = list of (seq, pr, items) sorted by seq\ndeliv_by_day = collections.defaultdict(list)\nfor (day, pr), items in deliv.items():\n    seq = wseq[(day, pr)]\n    deliv_by_day[day].append((seq, pr, items))\nfor day in deliv_by_day:\n    deliv_by_day[day].sort()\n\n# store order per day sorted by store sequence\nstore_order_by_day = collections.defaultdict(list)\nfor day in range(1, NDAYS+1):\n    lst = []\n    for s in STORES:\n        seq = sinfo[(day, s)][0]\n        lst.append((seq, s))\n    lst.sort()\n    store_order_by_day[day] = lst\n\ndef run_alloc(same_day=True):\n    # per-product FIFO queue of [producer, qty_remaining]\n    queues = {p: deque() for p in PRODUCTS}\n    alloc = {}  # (day,store,product) -> list of (producer, qty)\n    store_total = collections.Counter()  # (day,store) -> total delivered\n    pending = None  # for next-day model\n    for day in range(1, NDAYS+1):\n        # 1. add this day's deliveries (ordered by seq)\n        if same_day:\n            for seq, pr, items in deliv_by_day[day]:\n                for p, q in items.items():\n                    if q>0:\n                        queues[p].append([pr, q])\n        else:\n            # add yesterday's pending\n            if pending is not None:\n                for seq, pr, items in pending:\n                    for p, q in items.items():\n                        if q>0:\n                            queues[p].append([pr, q])\n            pending = deliv_by_day[day]\n        # 2. fulfill stores in sequence order\n        for seq, s in store_order_by_day[day]:\n            ord_items = orders.get((day, s), {})\n            for p, want in ord_items.items():\n                want = int(want)\n                q = queues[p]\n                got = []\n                while want > 0 and q:\n                    batch = q[0]\n                    take = min(want, batch[1])\n                    got.append((batch[0], take))\n                    batch[1] -= take\n                    want -= take\n                    if batch[1] == 0:\n                        q.popleft()\n                if got:\n                    # merge consecutive same producer\n                    merged = []\n                    for pr, qty in got:\n                        if merged and merged[-1][0]==pr:\n                            merged[-1] = (pr, merged[-1][1]+qty)\n                        else:\n                            merged.append((pr, qty))\n                    alloc[(day, s, p)] = merged\n                    store_total[(day, s)] += sum(x[1] for x in merged)\n    return alloc, store_total, queues\n\nfor same_day in (True, False):\n    alloc, store_total, queues = run_alloc(same_day)\n    # {"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_015x5HeeMr6sUuDvfy8Zdrzh","type":"tool_result","content":"File created successfully at: /app/alloc.py (file state is current in your context — no need to Read it back)"}]},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"65822cf6-c656-4a75-a87b-8b7ed7bc685a","uuid":"ea74740c-d150-4715-a93b-eddce8908bc2","timestamp":"2026-06-02T17:26:16.823Z","tool_use_result":{"type":"create","filePath":"/app/alloc.py","content":"import pickle, collections\nfrom collections import deque\n\nd = pickle.load(open('/tmp/parsed.pkl','rb'))\norders, deliv, wseq, sinfo = d['orders'], d['deliv'], d['wseq'], d['sinfo']\n\nNDAYS = 365\nPRODUCTS = [f'P_{i}' for i in range(1,31)]\nSTORES = [f'S_{i}' for i in range(1,11)]\n\n# Pre-index producer deliveries per (day) ordered by wholesaler sequence\n# deliv_by_day[d] = list of (seq, pr, items) sorted by seq\ndeliv_by_day = collections.defaultdict(list)\nfor (day, pr), items in deliv.items():\n    seq = wseq[(day, pr)]\n    deliv_by_day[day].append((seq, pr, items))\nfor day in deliv_by_day:\n    deliv_by_day[day].sort()\n\n# store order per day sorted by store sequence\nstore_order_by_day = collections.defaultdict(list)\nfor day in range(1, NDAYS+1):\n    lst = []\n    for s in STORES:\n        seq = sinfo[(day, s)][0]\n        lst.append((seq, s))\n    lst.sort()\n    store_order_by_day[day] = lst\n\ndef run_alloc(same_day=True):\n    # per-product FIFO queue of [producer, qty_remaining]\n    queues = {p: deque() for p in PRODUCTS}\n    alloc = {}  # (day,store,product) -> list of (producer, qty)\n    store_total = collections.Counter()  # (day,store) -> total delivered\n    pending = None  # for next-day model\n    for day in range(1, NDAYS+1):\n        # 1. add this day's deliveries (ordered by seq)\n        if same_day:\n            for seq, pr, items in deliv_by_day[day]:\n                for p, q in items.items():\n                    if q>0:\n                        queues[p].append([pr, q])\n        else:\n            # add yesterday's pending\n            if pending is not None:\n                for seq, pr, items in pending:\n                    for p, q in items.items():\n                        if q>0:\n                            queues[p].append([pr, q])\n            pending = deliv_by_day[day]\n        # 2. fulfill stores in sequence order\n        for seq, s in store_order_by_day[day]:\n            ord_items = orders.get((day, s), {})\n            for p, want in ord_items.items():\n                want = int(want)\n                q = queues[p]\n                got = []\n                while want > 0 and q:\n                    batch = q[0]\n                    take = min(want, batch[1])\n                    got.append((batch[0], take))\n                    batch[1] -= take\n                    want -= take\n                    if batch[1] == 0:\n                        q.popleft()\n                if got:\n                    # merge consecutive same producer\n                    merged = []\n                    for pr, qty in got:\n                        if merged and merged[-1][0]==pr:\n                            merged[-1] = (pr, merged[-1][1]+qty)\n                        else:\n                            merged.append((pr, qty))\n                    alloc[(day, s, p)] = merged\n                    store_total[(day, s)] += sum(x[1] for x in merged)\n    return alloc, store_total, queues\n\nfor same_day in (True, False):\n    alloc, store_total, queues = run_alloc(same_day)\n    # validate checksum\n    mism = 0; total_units_alloc=0; total_units_recv=0\n    examples=[]\n    for (day, s), (seq, tot) in sinfo.items():\n        got = store_total.get((day, s), 0)\n        total_units_alloc += got; total_units_recv += tot\n        if got != tot:\n            mism += 1\n            if len(examples)<10: examples.append((day,s,got,tot))\n    leftover = sum(sum(b[1] for b in q) for q in queues.values())\n    print(f'same_day={same_day}: mismatches={mism}/3650, alloc_total={total_units_alloc}, recv_total={total_units_recv}, leftover_in_wh={leftover}')\n    if examples: print('  examples (day,store,got,expected):', examples)\n    if same_day and mism==0:\n        with open('/tmp/alloc.pkl','wb') as f:\n            pickle.dump(dict(alloc=alloc), f)\n        print('  saved alloc.pkl')\n","structuredPatch":[],"originalFile":null,"userModified":false}}

{"type":"assistant","message":{"model":"claude-opus-4-8","id":"msg_01W2m1aJhfs7b1amLWStckHX","type":"message","role":"assistant","content":[{"type":"tool_use","id":"toolu_018b9B6AgYHGRWZrnTuceeeQ","name":"Write","input":{"file_path":"/app/detect.py","content":"import pandas as pd, numpy as np, pickle\ng=pd.read_pickle('/tmp/agg.pkl')\nNDAYS=365\nSTORES=[f'S_{i}' for i in range(1,11)]\nPRODUCTS=[f'P_{i}' for i in range(1,31)]\n\n# Build demand matrix per product: day x store\ndef get_mat(P):\n    sub=g[g.Product_ID==P].pivot(index='Day',columns='Store_ID',values='demand').sort_index()\n    sub=sub.reindex(range(1,NDAYS+1))\n    return sub\n\n# recovery template deficit weights: stage1(3d)=0.8, stage2(4d)=0.5, stage3(7d)=0.2\nTEMPL=np.array([0.8]*3+[0.5]*4+[0.2]*7)\nTEMPL_c = TEMPL-TEMPL.mean()\n\ndef analyze(P, verbose=False):\n    sub=get_mat(P)\n    # robust base per store: high quantile (recovery only lowers demand)\n    base=sub.quantile(0.80, axis=0)\n    norm=sub/base\n    # calendar = cross-store median per day\n    cal=norm.median(axis=1)\n    resid=norm.div(cal,axis=0)  # ~1 normally, <1 in recovery\n    # iterate base once: re-estimate base using days where resid>0.9 (healthy)\n    for _ in range(2):\n        expected = pd.DataFrame(np.outer(cal.values, base.values), index=sub.index, columns=sub.columns)\n        ratio = sub/expected\n        # base update: mean of demand/cal over healthy days\n        healthy = ratio>0.9\n        dc = sub.div(cal, axis=0)\n        base = dc.where(healthy).mean(axis=0)\n        norm=sub/base; cal=norm.median(axis=1); resid=norm.div(cal,axis=0)\n    deficit = 1.0-resid  # positive when below expected\n    results=[]\n    for s in STORES:\n        d=deficit[s].values\n        d=np.nan_to_num(d,nan=0.0)\n        # matched filter score per onset\n        for onset in range(0, NDAYS-14):\n            win=d[onset:onset+14]\n            # require monotone-ish recovery: stage means decreasing & positive\n            m1=win[0:3].mean(); m2=win[3:7].mean(); m3=win[7:14].mean()\n            if m1>0.05 and m1>m2 and m2>m3 and m3>-0.02:\n                # correlation with template\n                score=np.dot(win-win.mean(), TEMPL_c)/ (np.linalg.norm(win-win.mean())*np.linalg.norm(TEMPL_c)+1e-9)\n                strength=m1  # depth of stage1\n                results.append((score*strength, score, m1,m2,m3, s, onset+1))\n    results.sort(reverse=True)\n    return results, resid, deficit\n\nallres=[]\nfor i in range(1,31):\n    P=f'P_{i}'\n    res,_,_=analyze(P)\n    if res:\n        top=res[0]\n        allres.append((top[0], P, top))\nallres.sort(reverse=True)\nprint('Top product events (score*depth, product, (s*d,corr,m1,m2,m3,store,onset)):')\nfor sc,P,top in allres[:30]:\n    print(f'{P:5s} sd={top[0]:.3f} corr={top[1]:.2f} m1={top[2]:.2f} m2={top[3]:.2f} m3={top[4]:.2f} {top[5]} onset={top[6]}')\n"},"caller":{"type":"direct"}}],"stop_reason":null,"stop_sequence":null,"stop_details":null,"usage":{"input_tokens":2,"cache_creation_input_tokens":7362,"cache_read_input_tokens":80981,"cache_creation":{"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":7362,"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":0},"output_tokens":53,"service_tier":"standard","inference_geo":"global"},"context_management":null},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"65822cf6-c656-4a75-a87b-8b7ed7bc685a","uuid":"34bef34d-e446-4b98-bc5c-567cea79d700","request_id":"req_011CbeqC92yK9PmQM8Wxz9KQ"}

cal=norm.median(axis=1)\n    resid=norm.div(cal,axis=0)\n    resid_all[P]=resid; base_all[P]=base; cal_all[P]=cal\npickle.dump(dict(resid=resid_all, base=base_all, cal=cal_all), open('/tmp/resid.pkl','wb'))\nprint('saved resid for', len(resid_all),'products')\n# noise level\nallr=np.concatenate([resid_all[P].values.flatten() for P in PRODUCTS])\nallr=allr[~np.isnan(allr)]\nprint('resid mean',round(allr.mean(),3),'std',round(allr.std(),3), 'p5',round(np.percentile(allr,5),3),'p50',round(np.percentile(allr,50),3))\n"},"caller":{"type":"direct"}}],"stop_reason":null,"stop_sequence":null,"stop_details":null,"usage":{"input_tokens":2,"cache_creation_input_tokens":1837,"cache_read_input_tokens":92954,"cache_creation":{"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":1837,"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":0},"output_tokens":29,"service_tier":"standard","inference_geo":"global"},"context_management":null},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"65822cf6-c656-4a75-a87b-8b7ed7bc685a","uuid":"08325e30-a973-4963-9cf3-2dbbfe897cae","request_id":"req_011CbeqHFJPr9SYJ3tzCTnAa"}

Let me compute these scores and look for separation between bad and good producers."}],"stop_reason":null,"stop_sequence":null,"stop_details":null,"usage":{"input_tokens":2,"cache_creation_input_tokens":125,"cache_read_input_tokens":98784,"cache_creation":{"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":125,"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":0},"output_tokens":51,"service_tier":"standard","inference_geo":"global"},"context_management":null},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"65822cf6-c656-4a75-a87b-8b7ed7bc685a","uuid":"d8e0e316-2603-4fba-825f-0e575abc6734","request_id":"req_011CbeqMmsmgwKwvqFcBR5y5"}
{"type":"assistant","message":{"model":"claude-opus-4-8","id":"msg_01AsKrKwvD3eR9Nn86ASCydT","type":"message","role":"assistant","content":[{"type":"tool_use","id":"toolu_01MVMyJEeS9hsyMBoNxE9vQ3","name":"Write","input":{"file_path":"/app/pooled.py","content":"import pandas as pd, numpy as np, pickle, collections\ng=pd.read_pickle('/tmp/agg.pkl')\nconsume=pickle.load(open('/tmp/consume.pkl','rb'))['consume']\nR=pickle.load(open('/tmp/resid.pkl','rb'))['resid']\nNDAYS=365\nSTORES=[f'S_{i}' for i in range(1,11)]\nPRODUCTS=[f'P_{i}' for i in range(1,31)]\n\n# sold totals per (day,store,product)\nsold={}\nfor r in g.itertuples(index=False):\n    sold[(r.Day,r.Store_ID,r.Product_ID)]=r.sold\n\n# resid lookup as numpy arrays per (P,store)\nresid_np={}\nfor P in PRODUCTS:\n    df=R[P]\n    for s in STORES:\n        resid_np[(P,s)]=df[s].values  # index 0 = day1\n\nLEVEL=np.array([0.8]*3+[0.5]*4+[0.2]*7)  # deficit template days1..14 after purchase\nWsum=LEVEL.sum()\n\n# Build events per (producer, product)\nevents=collections.defaultdict(list)  # (pr,P)->list of (s, D0, share, qty)\nfor (day,s,P),lst in consume.items():\n    tot=sold.get((day,s,P),0)\n    if tot<=0: continue\n    for pr,qty in lst:\n        events[(pr,P)].append((s,day,qty/tot,qty))\n\ndef profile_score(evs, weighted=False):\n    # average deficit profile over events; return (score, nev, profile14)\n    prof=np.zeros(14); wsum=np.zeros(14)\n    for s,D0,share,qty in evs:\n        arr=resid_np[(P,s)]\n        for k in range(1,15):\n            di=D0-1+k  # day D0+k index\n            if di<NDAYS:\n                v=arr[di]\n                if not np.isnan(v):\n                    w=share if weighted else 1.0\n                    prof[k-1]+= (1.0-v)*w\n                    wsum[k-1]+= w\n    prof=np.where(wsum>0, prof/np.maximum(wsum,1e-9), 0.0)\n    score=float(np.dot(prof, LEVEL)/Wsum)\n    return score, len(evs), prof\n\nrows=[]\nfor P in PRODUCTS:\n    for prnum in range(1,61):\n        pr=f'PR_{prnum}'\n        evs=events.get((pr,P))\n        if not evs:\n            continue\n        sc,nev,prof=profile_score(evs)\n        rows.append((P,pr,sc,nev,prof))\n\n# distribution of scores\nscores=np.array([r[2] for r in rows])\nprint('score dist: mean',round(scores.mean(),4),'std',round(scores.std(),4),\n      'p50',round(np.percentile(scores,50),4),'p90',round(np.percentile(scores,90),4),\n      'p99',round(np.percentile(scores,99),4),'max',round(scores.max(),4))\n# top 40\nrows.sort(key=lambda x:-x[2])\nprint('\\nTop 40 (P, PR, score, nevents):')\nfor P,pr,sc,nev,prof in rows[:40]:\n    print(f'{P:5s} {pr:6s} score={sc:.4f} nev={nev:4d} prof[1,4,8,14]={prof[0]:.3f},{prof[3]:.3f},{prof[7]:.3f},{prof[13]:.3f}')\npickle.dump(rows, open('/tmp/pooled_rows.pkl','wb'))\n"},"caller":{"type":"direct"}}],"stop_reason":null,"stop_sequence":null,"stop_details":null,"usage":{"input_tokens":2,"cache_creation_input_tokens":125,"cache_read_input_tokens":98784,"cache_creation":{"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":125,"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":0},"output_tokens":51,"service_tier":"standard","inference_geo":"global"},"context_management":null},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"65822cf6-c656-4a75-a87b-8b7ed7bc685a","uuid":"e324cac2-62bb-4d31-b8cf-4af56480310f","request_id":"req_011CbeqMmsmgwKwvqFcBR5y5"}

return (score, nev, profile14)\n    prof=np.zeros(14); wsum=np.zeros(14)\n    for s,D0,share,qty in evs:\n        arr=resid_np[(P,s)]\n        for k in range(1,15):\n            di=D0-1+k  # day D0+k index\n            if di<NDAYS:\n                v=arr[di]\n                if not np.isnan(v):\n                    w=share if weighted else 1.0\n                    prof[k-1]+= (1.0-v)*w\n                    wsum[k-1]+= w\n    prof=np.where(wsum>0, prof/np.maximum(wsum,1e-9), 0.0)\n    score=float(np.dot(prof, LEVEL)/Wsum)\n    return score, len(evs), prof\n\nrows=[]\nfor P in PRODUCTS:\n    for prnum in range(1,61):\n        pr=f'PR_{prnum}'\n        evs=events.get((pr,P))\n        if not evs:\n            continue\n        sc,nev,prof=profile_score(evs)\n        rows.append((P,pr,sc,nev,prof))\n\n# distribution of scores\nscores=np.array([r[2] for r in rows])\nprint('score dist: mean',round(scores.mean(),4),'std',round(scores.std(),4),\n      'p50',round(np.percentile(scores,50),4),'p90',round(np.percentile(scores,90),4),\n      'p99',round(np.percentile(scores,99),4),'max',round(scores.max(),4))\n# top 40\nrows.sort(key=lambda x:-x[2])\nprint('\\nTop 40 (P, PR, score, nevents):')\nfor P,pr,sc,nev,prof in rows[:40]:\n    print(f'{P:5s} {pr:6s} score={sc:.4f} nev={nev:4d} prof[1,4,8,14]={prof[0]:.3f},{prof[3]:.3f},{prof[7]:.3f},{prof[13]:.3f}')\npickle.dump(rows, open('/tmp/pooled_rows.pkl','wb'))\n","structuredPatch":[],"originalFile":null,"userModified":false}}

{"type":"assistant","message":{"model":"claude-opus-4-8","id":"msg_01SpHzSho31YnMXkupsrH6Yc","type":"message","role":"assistant","content":[{"type":"text","text":"The pooled scores reveal clear structure: certain products (P_17, P_18, P_12, P_7, P_13, P_24...) have elevated deficits across **many** producers, with a clean staircase decay (0.03→0.02→0.01) — a real recovery signal. But within a \"bad\" product, dips are ubiquitous so every producer looks bad (confounding). \n\nThis is actually a **linear deconvolution problem**: deficit[s,t] = Σ_PR (bad?) · (consumption ⊛ recovery-kernel). Let me solve it via NNLS, which directly handles the attribution."}],"stop_reason":null,"stop_sequence":null,"stop_details":null,"usage":{"input_tokens":2,"cache_creation_input_tokens":2160,"cache_read_input_tokens":101553,"cache_creation":{"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":2160,"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":0},"output_tokens":37,"service_tier":"standard","inference_geo":"global"},"context_management":null},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"65822cf6-c656-4a75-a87b-8b7ed7bc685a","uuid":"9c491fac-e9af-4044-b087-d01184fbd8cb","request_id":"req_011CbeqRhsXWf12Bz1uZryV7"}
{"type":"assistant","message":{"model":"claude-opus-4-8","id":"msg_01SpHzSho31YnMXkupsrH6Yc","type":"message","role":"assistant","content":[{"type":"tool_use","id":"toolu_01JWnKadtDEir7LmTWgyeBhr","name":"Write","input":{"file_path":"/app/deconv.py","content":"import pandas as pd, numpy as np, pickle, collections\nfrom scipy.optimize import nnls\ng=pd.read_pickle('/tmp/agg.pkl')\nconsume=pickle.load(open('/tmp/consume.pkl','rb'))['consume']\nRR=pickle.load(open('/tmp/resid.pkl','rb'))\nR=RR['resid']; BASE=RR['base']\nNDAYS=365\nSTORES=[f'S_{i}' for i in range(1,11)]\nPRODUCTS=[f'P_{i}' for i in range(1,31)]\nPRS=[f'PR_{i}' for i in range(1,61)]\n\n# deficit kernel: demand reduction fraction on days 1..14 after a bad purchase\nK=np.array([0.8]*3+[0.5]*4+[0.2]*7)\n\n# consumption qty by (P, PR, store) -> array over days (index 0=day1)\ncq=collections.defaultdict(lambda: np.zeros(NDAYS))\nfor (day,s,P),lst in consume.items():\n    for pr,qty in lst:\n        cq[(P,pr,s)][day-1]+=qty\n\ndef build(P):\n    base=BASE[P]  # per store\n    resid=R[P]    # df day x store\n    # which producers active for P\n    active=[pr for pr in PRS if any((P,pr,s) in cq for s in STORES)]\n    # design: rows = (store, day t) for t in 1..365 ; cols = active producers\n    Xrows=[]; yrows=[]; rowmeta=[]\n    # Precompute F per producer per store\n    F={}  # (pr,s)-> array over days (effect)\n    for pr in active:\n        for s in STORES:\n            c=cq.get((P,pr,s))\n            if c is None: continue\n            f=np.zeros(NDAYS)\n            idx=np.nonzero(c)[0]\n            for D0 in idx:\n                q=c[D0]\n                for j in range(1,15):\n                    t=D0+j\n                    if t<NDAYS:\n                        f[t]+=q*K[j-1]\n            F[(pr,s)]=f/base[s]\n    for s in STORES:\n        y=(1.0-resid[s].values)  # deficit per day\n        for t in range(NDAYS):\n            if np.isnan(y[t]): continue\n            rowmeta.append((s,t+1))\n            yrows.append(y[t])\n            Xrows.append([F.get((pr,s),np.zeros(NDAYS))[t] for pr in active])\n    X=np.array(Xrows); y=np.array(yrows)\n    return X,y,active,rowmeta\n\nresults={}\nfor P in PRODUCTS:\n    X,y,active,meta=build(P)\n    if X.shape[1]==0:\n        results[P]={}; continue\n    coef,rnorm=nnls(X,y)\n    results[P]=dict(zip(active,coef))\n\n# print summary\nfor P in PRODUCTS:\n    d=results[P]\n    if not d:\n        print(f'{P}: no producers'); continue\n    vals=sorted(d.items(), key=lambda x:-x[1])\n    pos=[(pr,round(c,3)) for pr,c in vals if c>0.05]\n    print(f'{P:5s} nactive={len(d)} n(coef>0.05)={len(pos)} top: {pos[:12]}')\npickle.dump(results, open('/tmp/nnls.pkl','wb'))\n"},"caller":{"type":"direct"}}],"stop_reason":null,"stop_sequence":null,"stop_details":null,"usage":{"input_tokens":2,"cache_creation_input_tokens":2160,"cache_read_input_tokens":101553,"cache_creation":{"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":2160,"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":0},"output_tokens":37,"service_tier":"standard","inference_geo":"global"},"context_management":null},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"65822cf6-c656-4a75-a87b-8b7ed7bc685a","uuid":"6e352ca1-951c-47ae-a8ac-3e9f65581d75","request_id":"req_011CbeqRhsXWf12Bz1uZryV7"}

cols = active producers\n    Xrows=[]; yrows=[]; rowmeta=[]\n    # Precompute F per producer per store\n    F={}  # (pr,s)-> array over days (effect)\n    for pr in active:\n        for s in STORES:\n            c=cq.get((P,pr,s))\n            if c is None: continue\n            f=np.zeros(NDAYS)\n            idx=np.nonzero(c)[0]\n            for D0 in idx:\n                q=c[D0]\n                for j in range(1,15):\n                    t=D0+j\n                    if t<NDAYS:\n                        f[t]+=q*K[j-1]\n            F[(pr,s)]=f/base[s]\n    for s in STORES:\n        y=(1.0-resid[s].values)  # deficit per day\n        for t in range(NDAYS):\n            if np.isnan(y[t]): continue\n            rowmeta.append((s,t+1))\n            yrows.append(y[t])\n            Xrows.append([F.get((pr,s),np.zeros(NDAYS))[t] for pr in active])\n    X=np.array(Xrows); continue\n    vals=sorted(d.items(), key=lambda x:-x[1])\n    pos=[(pr,round(c,3)) for pr,c in vals if c>0.05]\n    print(f'{P:5s} nactive={len(d)} n(coef>0.05)={len(pos)} top: {pos[:12]}')\npickle.dump(results, open('/tmp/nnls.pkl','wb'))\n","structuredPatch":[],"originalFile":null,"userModified":false}}

{"type":"assistant","message":{"model":"claude-opus-4-8","id":"msg_01FfuP39VHwyhahdZsfPkHpp","type":"message","role":"assistant","content":[{"type":"tool_use","id":"toolu_0134vR9QCrCiCECN4CVxNYNp","name":"Write","input":{"file_path":"/app/validate.py","content":"import pandas as pd, numpy as np, pickle, collections\nfrom scipy.optimize import nnls\ng=pd.read_pickle('/tmp/agg.pkl')\nconsume=pickle.load(open('/tmp/consume.pkl','rb'))['consume']\nRR=pickle.load(open('/tmp/resid.pkl','rb'))\nR=RR['resid']; BASE=RR['base']\nNDAYS=365\nSTORES=[f'S_{i}' for i in range(1,11)]\nPRODUCTS=[f'P_{i}' for i in range(1,31)]\nPRS=[f'PR_{i}' for i in range(1,61)]\nK=np.array([0.8]*3+[0.5]*4+[0.2]*7)\n\ncq=collections.defaultdict(lambda: np.zeros(NDAYS))\nfor (day,s,P),lst in consume.items():\n    for pr,qty in lst:\n        cq[(P,pr,s)][day-1]+=qty\n\ndef kernel_conv(c, base_s):\n    f=np.zeros(NDAYS)\n    idx=np.nonzero(c)[0]\n    for D0 in idx:\n        q=c[D0]\n        for j in range(1,15):\n            t=D0+j\n            if t<NDAYS: f[t]+=q*K[j-1]\n    return f/base_s\n\ndef build(P, day_mask=None):\n    base=BASE[P]; resid=R[P]\n    active=[pr for pr in PRS if any((P,pr,s) in cq for s in STORES)]\n    Fcols={pr:[] for pr in active}; yall=[]\n    # also phantom producers: circularly-shift a real producer's consumption by 180d\n    for s in STORES:\n        F={pr:kernel_conv(cq[(P,pr,s)], base[s]) for pr in active if (P,pr,s) in cq or True}\n        y=(1.0-resid[s].values)\n        for t in range(NDAYS):\n            if day_mask is not None and not day_mask[t]: continue\n            if np.isnan(y[t]): continue\n            yall.append(y[t])\n            for pr in active:\n                Fcols[pr].append(F.get(pr,np.zeros(NDAYS))[t] if pr in F else 0.0)\n    X=np.column_stack([Fcols[pr] for pr in active]) if active else np.zeros((len(yall),0))\n    return X, np.array(yall), active\n\ndef fit_stats(X,y,active):\n    coef,_=nnls(X,y)\n    pred=X@coef\n    rss=float(np.sum((y-pred)**2)); tss=float(np.sum(y**2))\n    r2=1-rss/tss\n    # drop-one unique contribution\n    uniq={}\n    for i,pr in enumerate(active):\n        if coef[i]<=1e-9:\n            uniq[pr]=0.0; continue\n        keep=[j for j in range(len(active)) if j!=i]\n        Xd=X[:,keep]\n        cd,_=nnls(Xd,y)\n        rss_d=float(np.sum((y-Xd@cd)**2))\n        uniq[pr]=rss_d-rss  # increase in RSS when PR removed (>=0)\n    return dict(zip(active,coef)), r2, rss, tss, uniq\n\nprint(f\"{'P':5s} {'R2':>5s}  full_coef>0.03 (coef, uniqRSS-drop)  \")\nsummary={}\nfor P in PRODUCTS:\n    X,y,active=build(P)\n    coef,r2,rss,tss,uniq=fit_stats(X,y,active)\n    # normalize uniq by tss for comparability\n    items=[(pr,coef[pr],uniq[pr]/tss) for pr in active if coef[pr]>0.001]\n    items.sort(key=lambda z:-z[2])\n    show=[(pr,round(c,3),round(u,4)) for pr,c,u in items if c>0.02]\n    print(f'{P:5s} {r2:5.2f}  {show}')\n    summary[P]=dict(coef=coef, uniq=uniq, r2=r2, tss=tss, active=active)\npickle.dump(summary, open('/tmp/validate.pkl','wb'))\n"},"caller":{"type":"direct"}}],"stop_reason":null,"stop_sequence":null,"stop_details":null,"usage":{"input_tokens":2,"cache_creation_input_tokens":4948,"cache_read_input_tokens":112697,"cache_creation":{"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":4948,"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":0},"output_tokens":54,"service_tier":"standard","inference_geo":"global"},"context_management":null},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"65822cf6-c656-4a75-a87b-8b7ed7bc685a","uuid":"4f6085d1-d4b9-465e-9282-30abe9117881","request_id":"req_011CbeqcWGajAbTk87LVzB4a"}

{"type":"assistant","message":{"model":"claude-opus-4-8","id":"msg_018jQev9WXAtDqsKuGAuxNMe","type":"message","role":"assistant","content":[{"type":"tool_use","id":"toolu_01To6McK7ZSzou3cWCkEvdqh","name":"Write","input":{"file_path":"/app/nulltest.py","content":"import pandas as pd, numpy as np, pickle, collections, random\nfrom scipy.optimize import nnls\ng=pd.read_pickle('/tmp/agg.pkl')\nconsume=pickle.load(open('/tmp/consume.pkl','rb'))['consume']\nRR=pickle.load(open('/tmp/resid.pkl','rb'))\nR=RR['resid']; BASE=RR['base']\nNDAYS=365\nSTORES=[f'S_{i}' for i in range(1,11)]\nPRODUCTS=[f'P_{i}' for i in range(1,31)]\nPRS=[f'PR_{i}' for i in range(1,61)]\nK=np.array([0.8]*3+[0.5]*4+[0.2]*7)\nrandom.seed(12345); np.random.seed(12345)\n\ncq=collections.defaultdict(lambda: np.zeros(NDAYS))\nfor (day,s,P),lst in consume.items():\n    for pr,qty in lst:\n        cq[(P,pr,s)][day-1]+=qty\n\ndef kernel_conv(c, base_s):\n    f=np.zeros(NDAYS); idx=np.nonzero(c)[0]\n    for D0 in idx:\n        q=c[D0]\n        for j in range(1,15):\n            t=D0+j\n            if t<NDAYS: f[t]+=q*K[j-1]\n    return f/base_s\n\ndef build(P):\n    base=BASE[P]; resid=R[P]\n    active=[pr for pr in PRS if any((P,pr,s) in cq for s in STORES)]\n    # store-block structure: per store a (365,) y and (365,nactive) X\n    Xb=[]; Yb=[]\n    for s in STORES:\n        Fs=np.column_stack([kernel_conv(cq.get((P,pr,s),np.zeros(NDAYS)), base[s]) for pr in active])\n        ys=(1.0-resid[s].values)\n        Xb.append(Fs); Yb.append(ys)\n    return Xb, Yb, active\n\ndef stack(Xb,Yb,shifts=None):\n    Xs=[];Ys=[]\n    for i,(X,y) in enumerate(zip(Xb,Yb)):\n        yy=y.copy()\n        if shifts is not None:\n            yy=np.roll(yy, shifts[i])\n        mask=~np.isnan(yy)\n        Xs.append(X[mask]); Ys.append(yy[mask])\n    return np.vstack(Xs), np.concatenate(Ys)\n\nNPERM=60\nout={}\nfor P in PRODUCTS:\n    Xb,Yb,active=build(P)\n    X,y=stack(Xb,Yb)\n    coef,_=nnls(X,y)\n    realcoef=dict(zip(active,coef))\n    # null\n    nullmax=[]  # max coef per perm\n    nullcoef={pr:[] for pr in active}\n    for _ in range(NPERM):\n        shifts=[random.randint(20,345) for _ in STORES]\n        Xn,yn=stack(Xb,Yb,shifts)\n        cn,_=nnls(Xn,yn)\n        nullmax.append(cn.max())\n        for pr,c in zip(active,cn): nullcoef[pr].append(c)\n    thr_global=np.percentile(nullmax,95)   # control familywise within product\n    out[P]=dict(realcoef=realcoef, thr_global=float(thr_global),\n                null99={pr:float(np.percentile(nullcoef[pr],99)) for pr in active},\n                nullmax_mean=float(np.mean(nullmax)))\n    sig=[(pr,round(realcoef[pr],3)) for pr in active if realcoef[pr]>thr_global]\n    sig.sort(key=lambda z:-z[1])\n    print(f'{P:5s} thr95(maxnull)={thr_global:.3f}  significant(coef>thr): {sig}')\npickle.dump(out, open('/tmp/null.pkl','wb'))\n"},"caller":{"type":"direct"}}],"stop_reason":null,"stop_sequence":null,"stop_details":null,"usage":{"input_tokens":2,"cache_creation_input_tokens":1478,"cache_read_input_tokens":122401,"cache_creation":{"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":1478,"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":0},"output_tokens":37,"service_tier":"standard","inference_geo":"global"},"context_management":null},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"65822cf6-c656-4a75-a87b-8b7ed7bc685a","uuid":"24ed1f8b-6e9e-4a5f-a9a5-87c50e658379","request_id":"req_011CbeqhjFpaKoFpota9nfNF"}

BASE=RR['base']\nNDAYS=365\nSTORES=[f'S_{i}' for i in range(1,11)]\nPRODUCTS=[f'P_{i}' for i in range(1,31)]\nPRS=[f'PR_{i}' for i in range(1,61)]\nK=np.array([0.8]*3+[0.5]*4+[0.2]*7)\nrandom.seed(7); np.random.seed(7)\n\ncq=collections.defaultdict(lambda: np.zeros(NDAYS))\nfor (day,s,P),lst in consume.items():\n    for pr,qty in lst:\n        cq[(P,pr,s)][day-1]+=qty\n\ndef kernel_conv(c, base_s):\n    f=np.zeros(NDAYS); idx=np.nonzero(c)[0]\n    for D0 in idx:\n        q=c[D0]\n        for j in range(1,15):\n            t=D0+j\n            if t<NDAYS: f[t]+=q*K[j-1]\n    return f/base_s\n\ndef build(P):\n    base=BASE[P]; resid=R[P]\n    active=[pr for pr in PRS if any((P,pr,s) in cq for s in STORES)]\n    Xb=[]; Yb=[]\n    for s in STORES:\n        Fs=np.column_stack([kernel_conv(cq.get((P,pr,s),np.zeros(NDAYS)), base[s]) for pr in active])\n        Xb.append(Fs); Yb.append((1.0-resid[s].values))\n    return Xb,Yb,active\n\ndef stack(Xb,Yb,shifts=None):\n    Xs=[];Ys=[]\n    for i,(X,y) in enumerate(zip(Xb,Yb)):\n        yy=np.roll(y,shifts[i]) if shifts is not None else y\n        m=~np.isnan(yy); Xs.append(X[m]); Ys.append(yy[m])\n    return np.vstack(Xs), np.concatenate(Ys)\n\ndef uniq_drops(X,y,active):\n    coef,_=nnls(X,y); rss=np.sum((y-X@coef)**2)\n    drops={}\n    for i,pr in enumerate(active):\n        keep=[j for j in range(len(active)) if j!=i]\n        cd,_=nnls(X[:,keep],y); {"type":"assistant","message":{"model":"claude-opus-4-8","id":"msg_016eCPf7BGu3wviN5XbisaX7","type":"message","role":"assistant","content":[{"type":"text","text":"The z-test over-detects (null unique-drop variance is degenerate). The real confound is *leakage* between correlated producers. The principled tool here is a **knockoff filter**: build a causally-null \"knockoff\" of each producer (its consumption time-shifted), and a producer is confirmed only if its unique contribution beats its knockoff's. This controls false attribution from collinearity."}],"stop_reason":null,"stop_sequence":null,"stop_details":null,"usage":{"input_tokens":2,"cache_creation_input_tokens":3231,"cache_read_input_tokens":134299,"cache_creation":{"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":3231,"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":0},"output_tokens":51,"service_tier":"standard","inference_geo":"global"},"context_management":null},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"65822cf6-c656-4a75-a87b-8b7ed7bc685a","uuid":"1aa30fdb-3e4f-427b-bcea-f34caaf2caea","request_id":"req_011CbeqtbzKPj8erKW61gU6G"}
{"type":"assistant","message":{"model":"claude-opus-4-8","id":"msg_016eCPf7BGu3wviN5XbisaX7","type":"message","role":"assistant","content":[{"type":"tool_use","id":"toolu_01GdaKNc1A8LVtgciqEtWzU7","name":"Write","input":{"file_path":"/app/knockoff.py","content":"import pandas as pd, numpy as np, pickle, collections, random\nfrom scipy.optimize import nnls\ng=pd.read_pickle('/tmp/agg.pkl')\nconsume=pickle.load(open('/tmp/consume.pkl','rb'))['consume']\nRR=pickle.load(open('/tmp/resid.pkl','rb'))\nR=RR['resid']; BASE=RR['base']\nNDAYS=365\nSTORES=[f'S_{i}' for i in range(1,11)]\nPRODUCTS=[f'P_{i}' for i in range(1,31)]\nPRS=[f'PR_{i}' for i in range(1,61)]\nK=np.array([0.8]*3+[0.5]*4+[0.2]*7)\n\ncq=collections.defaultdict(lambda: np.zeros(NDAYS))\nfor (day,s,P),lst in consume.items():\n    for pr,qty in lst:\n        cq[(P,pr,s)][day-1]+=qty\n\ndef kernel_conv(c, base_s):\n    f=np.zeros(NDAYS); idx=np.nonzero(c)[0]\n    for D0 in idx:\n        q=c[D0]\n        for j in range(1,15):\n            t=D0+j\n            if t<NDAYS: f[t]+=q*K[j-1]\n    return f/base_s\n\ndef build_real(P):\n    base=BASE[P]; resid=R[P]\n    active=[pr for pr in PRS if any((P,pr,s) in cq for s in STORES)]\n    # per store regressor matrix and y\n    perstore=[]\n    for s in STORES:\n        Fs=np.column_stack([kernel_conv(cq.get((P,pr,s),np.zeros(NDAYS)), base[s]) for pr in active])\n        y=(1.0-resid[s].values)\n        perstore.append((Fs,y))\n    return perstore, active\n\ndef uniqdrops(X,y,ncols):\n    coef,_=nnls(X,y); rss=np.sum((y-X@coef)**2)\n    drops=np.zeros(ncols)\n    allidx=np.arange(X.shape[1])\n    for i in range(ncols):\n        keep=allidx[allidx!=i]\n        cd,_=nnls(X[:,keep],y); drops[i]=np.sum((y-X[:,keep]@cd)**2)-rss\n    return coef, drops, rss\n\ndef knockoff_W(P, seed):\n    rng=random.Random(seed)\n    perstore, active=build_real(P)\n    n=len(active)\n    # knockoff = roll each store's real regressor columns by a per-producer offset\n    offs=[rng.randint(40,325) for _ in range(n)]\n    Xs=[];Ys=[]\n    for Fs,y in perstore:\n        Fk=np.column_stack([np.roll(Fs[:,i], offs[i]) for i in range(n)])\n        Xfull=np.hstack([Fs,Fk])\n        m=~np.isnan(y)\n        Xs.append(Xfull[m]); Ys.append(y[m])\n    X=np.vstack(Xs); y=np.concatenate(Ys)\n    coef,drops,rss=uniqdrops(X,y,2*n)\n    Wreal=drops[:n]; Wknock=drops[n:]\n    return active, Wreal, Wknock, coef[:n]\n\ndef knockoff_threshold(W, Wk, q=0.10):\n    # standard knockoff+ : stat = W_real - W_knock (signed)\n    stat=W-Wk\n    ts=np.unique(np.abs(stat))\n    best=np.inf\n    for t in ts:\n        if t<=0: continue\n        num=1+np.sum(stat<=-t); den=max(1,np.sum(stat>=t))\n        if num/den<=q:\n            best=t; break\n    sel=stat>=best\n    return sel, stat\n\nfinal={}\nfor P in PRODUCTS:\n    # average stats over several knockoff draws for stability\n    accW=None; accWk=None; coefacc=None; active=None; nd=3\n    Ws=[]; Wks=[]; coefs=[]\n    for sd in range(nd):\n        active, Wr, Wk, cf = knockoff_W(P, seed=1000+sd*7+hash(P)%50)\n        Ws.append(Wr); Wks.append(Wk); coefs.append(cf)\n    Wr=np.mean(Ws,axis=0); Wk=np.mean(Wks,axis=0); cf=np.mean(coefs,axis=0)\n    sel,stat=knockoff_threshold(Wr,Wk,q=0.10)\n    conf=[(active[i],round(cf[i],3),round(Wr[i],4),round(stat[i],4)) for i in range(len(active)) if sel[i]]\n    conf.sort(key=lambda z:-z[2])\n    final[P]=dict(active=active,Wreal=Wr,Wknock=Wk,coef=cf,sel=sel,stat=stat)\n    print(f'{P:5s} confirmed(knockoff q=.10): {[(c[0],c[1]) for c in conf]}')\npickle.dump(final, open('/tmp/knockoff.pkl','wb'))\n"},"caller":{"type":"direct"}}],"stop_reason":null,"stop_sequence":null,"stop_details":null,"usage":{"input_tokens":2,"cache_creation_input_tokens":3231,"cache_read_input_tokens":134299,"cache_creation":{"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":3231,"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":0},"output_tokens":51,"service_tier":"standard","inference_geo":"global"},"context_management":null},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"65822cf6-c656-4a75-a87b-8b7ed7bc685a","uuid":"c87bd559-0420-438a-a3bb-450f0f095483","request_id":"req_011CbeqtbzKPj8erKW61gU6G"}

{"type":"assistant","message":{"model":"claude-opus-4-8","id":"msg_01WnKnxGKqPq5NwMNAkU8N9G","type":"message","role":"assistant","content":[{"type":"tool_use","id":"toolu_01Btm4ranmyqeiQyrbxm1BUQ","name":"Write","input":{"file_path":"/app/final_detect.py","content":"import pandas as pd, numpy as np, pickle, collections, random\nfrom scipy.optimize import nnls\ng=pd.read_pickle('/tmp/agg.pkl')\nconsume=pickle.load(open('/tmp/consume.pkl','rb'))['consume']\nRR=pickle.load(open('/tmp/resid.pkl','rb'))\nR=RR['resid']; BASE=RR['base']\nNDAYS=365\nSTORES=[f'S_{i}' for i in range(1,11)]\nPRODUCTS=[f'P_{i}' for i in range(1,31)]\nPRS=[f'PR_{i}' for i in range(1,61)]\nK=np.array([0.8]*3+[0.5]*4+[0.2]*7)\n\ncq=collections.defaultdict(lambda: np.zeros(NDAYS))\nfor (day,s,P),lst in consume.items():\n    for pr,qty in lst:\n        cq[(P,pr,s)][day-1]+=qty\ndef kc(c, b):\n    f=np.zeros(NDAYS);\n    for D0 in np.nonzero(c)[0]:\n        q=c[D0]\n        for j in range(1,15):\n            t=D0+j\n            if t<NDAYS: f[t]+=q*K[j-1]\n    return f/b\ndef build_real(P):\n    base=BASE[P]; resid=R[P]\n    active=[pr for pr in PRS if any((P,pr,s) in cq for s in STORES)]\n    ps=[]\n    for s in STORES:\n        Fs=np.column_stack([kc(cq.get((P,pr,s),np.zeros(NDAYS)),base[s]) for pr in active])\n        ps.append((Fs,(1.0-resid[s].values)))\n    return ps,active\ndef fit_uniq(Xs,Ys,ncols_real):\n    X=np.vstack(Xs); y=np.concatenate(Ys)\n    coef,_=nnls(X,y); rss=np.sum((y-X@coef)**2)\n    drops=np.zeros(ncols_real); idx=np.arange(X.shape[1])\n    for i in range(ncols_real):\n        keep=idx[idx!=i]; cd,_=nnls(X[:,keep],y)\n        drops[i]=np.sum((y-X[:,keep]@cd)**2)-rss\n    return coef[:ncols_real],drops,rss\n\nreal_results={}; null_drops_all=[]\nfor P in PRODUCTS:\n    ps,active=build_real(P); n=len(active)\n    # real fit\n    Xs=[];Ys=[]\n    for Fs,y in ps:\n        m=~np.isnan(y); Xs.append(Fs[m]); Ys.append(y[m])\n    coef,drops,rss=fit_uniq(Xs,Ys,n)\n    real_results[P]=dict(active=active,coef=coef,drops=drops)\n    # null: shift ALL regressors (per store, per producer random offset), measure unique drops\n    for sd in range(8):\n        rng=random.Random(50+sd*13+ (hash(P)%97))\n        offs=[rng.randint(40,325) for _ in range(n)]\n        Xs2=[];Ys2=[]\n        for Fs,y in ps:\n            Fsh=np.column_stack([np.roll(Fs[:,i],offs[i]) for i in range(n)])\n            m=~np.isnan(y); Xs2.append(Fsh[m]); Ys2.append(y[m])\n        _,nd,_=fit_uniq(Xs2,Ys2,n)\n        null_drops_all.extend(nd.tolist())\n\nnull=np.array(null_drops_all)\nfloor99=np.percentile(null,99); floor999=np.percentile(null,99.9); floormax=null.max()\nprint(f'null unique-drop floor: mean={null.mean():.5f} p99={floor99:.5f} p99.9={floor999:.5f} max={floormax:.5f} (n={len(null)})')\nprint()\nprint('Per product: real unique-drops sorted (coef) -- and which exceed null max')\nallconf={}\nfor P in PRODUCTS:\n    d=real_results[P]; active=d['active']; coef=d['coef']; drops=d['drops']\n    order=np.argsort(-drops)\n    shown=[]\n    conf=[]\n    for i in order:\n        if drops[i]<=1e-6: continue\n        mark='*CONF*' if drops[i]>floormax else ''\n        shown.append(f'{active[i]}:{coef[i]:.3f}/d{drops[i]:.4f}{mark}')\n        if drops[i]>floormax: conf.append(active[i])\n    allconf[P]=sorted(conf, key=lambda x:int(x[3:]))\n    print(f'{P:5s} {shown[:6]}')\nprint()\nimport json\nprint('CONFIRMED sets:')\nfor P in PRODUCTS:\n    print(f'  {P}: {allconf[P]}')\npickle.dump(dict(real=real_results, floor=dict(p99=floor99,p999=floor999,mx=floormax), conf=allconf), open('/tmp/final.pkl','wb'))\n"},"caller":{"type":"direct"}}],"stop_reason":null,"stop_sequence":null,"stop_details":null,"usage":{"input_tokens":2,"cache_creation_input_tokens":2161,"cache_read_input_tokens":145118,"cache_creation":{"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":2161,"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":0},"output_tokens":38,"service_tier":"standard","inference_geo":"global"},"context_management":null},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"65822cf6-c656-4a75-a87b-8b7ed7bc685a","uuid":"e40ab6b8-600a-4577-902e-67e1663991c0","request_id":"req_011Cber2xfzWyxQoitwFf25w"}

{"type":"assistant","message":{"model":"claude-opus-4-8","id":"msg_01Kv58Rsh66ceJCb2GXy7Ja2","type":"message","role":"assistant","content":[{"type":"tool_use","id":"toolu_018YZMjpZvG8TPyYUCJZAjMp","name":"Write","input":{"file_path":"/app/soloday.py","content":"import pandas as pd, numpy as np, pickle, collections\ng=pd.read_pickle('/tmp/agg.pkl')\nconsume=pickle.load(open('/tmp/consume.pkl','rb'))['consume']\nRR=pickle.load(open('/tmp/resid.pkl','rb'))\nR=RR['resid']\nNDAYS=365\nSTORES=[f'S_{i}' for i in range(1,11)]\nPRODUCTS=[f'P_{i}' for i in range(1,31)]\nK=np.array([0.8]*3+[0.5]*4+[0.2]*7); Wsum=K.sum()\nsold={}\nfor r in g.itertuples(index=False):\n    sold[(r.Day,r.Store_ID,r.Product_ID)]=r.sold\n\nresid_np={(P,s):R[P][s].values for P in PRODUCTS for s in STORES}\n\n# For each (P,PR): collect solo days (only producer consumed that store-day) and dominant(>=0.7) days\nsolo=collections.defaultdict(list)      # (P,pr)->[(s,D0,qty)]\ndom =collections.defaultdict(list)\nfor (day,s,P),lst in consume.items():\n    tot=sold.get((day,s,P),0)\n    if tot<=0: continue\n    if len(lst)==1:\n        solo[(P,lst[0][0])].append((s,day,lst[0][1]))\n    # dominant single producer\n    big=max(lst,key=lambda z:z[1])\n    if big[1]/tot>=0.7 and len(lst)>=1:\n        dom[(P,big[0])].append((s,day,big[1]))\n\ndef post_deficit(events):\n    # template-weighted mean deficit over D0+1..D0+14 across events\n    num=0.0; den=0.0; tw=0.0; twn=0.0\n    for s,D0,q in events:\n        arr=resid_np[(P,s)]\n        for j in range(1,15):\n            di=D0-1+j\n            if di<NDAYS and not np.isnan(arr[di]):\n                num+=(1.0-arr[di])*K[j-1]; den+=K[j-1]\n    return (num/den) if den>0 else np.nan\n\n# baseline deficit per (P,s): overall mean deficit (to subtract local level)\nbasedef={}\nfor P in PRODUCTS:\n    for s in STORES:\n        arr=resid_np[(P,s)]\n        basedef[(P,s)]=np.nanmean(1.0-arr)\n\ndef post_deficit_adj(events):\n    vals=[]; ws=[]\n    for s,D0,q in events:\n        arr=resid_np[(P,s)]\n        acc=0.0; w=0.0\n        for j in range(1,15):\n            di=D0-1+j\n            if di<NDAYS and not np.isnan(arr[di]):\n                acc+=(1.0-arr[di])*K[j-1]; w+=K[j-1]\n        if w>0:\n            vals.append(acc/w - basedef[(P,s)])  # excess deficit over baseline\n            ws.append(1)\n    if not vals: return np.nan,0\n    return float(np.mean(vals)), len(vals)\n\nprint(f\"{'P':5s} {'PR':6s} {'nsolo':>5s} {'solo_excess':>11s} {'ndom':>5s} {'dom_excess':>10s}\")\nfin=pickle.load(open('/tmp/final.pkl','rb'))\nrows=[]\nfor P in PRODUCTS:\n    d=fin['real'][P]\n    for pr,c,dr in sorted(zip(d['active'],d['coef'],d['drops']),key=lambda z:-z[2]):\n        if dr<1e-4 and c<1e-4: continue\n        se,ns=post_deficit_adj(solo[(P,pr)]) if solo.get((P,pr)) else (np.nan,0)\n        de,nd=post_deficit_adj(dom[(P,pr)]) if dom.get((P,pr)) else (np.nan,0)\n        rows.append((P,pr,c,dr,ns,se,nd,de))\n        if dr>0.02 or (se==se and se>0.03):\n            print(f'{P:5s} {pr:6s} {ns:5d} {se if se==se else float(\"nan\"):11.4f} {nd:5d} {de if de==de else float(\"nan\"):10.4f}  coef={c:.3f} udrop={dr:.4f}')\npickle.dump(rows, open('/tmp/soloday.pkl','wb'))\n"},"caller":{"type":"direct"}}],"stop_reason":null,"stop_sequence":null,"stop_details":null,"usage":{"input_tokens":262,"cache_creation_input_tokens":5324,"cache_read_input_tokens":152530,"cache_creation":{"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":5324,"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":0},"output_tokens":45,"service_tier":"standard","inference_geo":"global"},"context_management":null},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"65822cf6-c656-4a75-a87b-8b7ed7bc685a","uuid":"a27ce8f4-b708-4807-aa0e-d00f60a830e0","request_id":"req_011CberBNtzonGoEv73K2J4Z"}

w+=K[j-1]\n        if w>0:\n            vals.append(acc/w - basedef[(P,s)])  # excess deficit over baseline\n            ws.append(1)\n    if not vals: return np.nan,0\n    return float(np.mean(vals)), len(vals)\n\nprint(f\"{'P':5s} {'PR':6s} {'nsolo':>5s} {'solo_excess':>11s} {'ndom':>5s} {'dom_excess':>10s}\")\nfin=pickle.load(open('/tmp/final.pkl','rb'))\nrows=[]\nfor P in PRODUCTS:\n    d=fin['real'][P]\n    for pr,c,dr in sorted(zip(d['active'],d['coef'],d['drops']),key=lambda z:-z[2]):\n        if dr<1e-4 and c<1e-4: continue\n        se,ns=post_deficit_adj(solo[(P,pr)]) if solo.get((P,pr)) else (np.nan,0)\n        de,nd=post_deficit_adj(dom[(P,pr)]) if dom.get((P,pr)) else (np.nan,0)\n        rows.append((P,pr,c,dr,ns,se,nd,de))\n        if dr>0.02 or (se==se and se>0.03):\n            print(f'{P:5s} {pr:6s} {ns:5d} {se if se==se else float(\"nan\"):11.4f} {nd:5d} {de if de==de else float(\"nan\"):10.4f}  coef={c:.3f} udrop={dr:.4f}')\npickle.dump(rows, open('/tmp/soloday.pkl','wb'))\n","structuredPatch":[],"originalFile":null,"userModified":false}}

BASE=RR['base']\nNDAYS=365\nSTORES=[f'S_{i}' for i in range(1,11)]\nPRODUCTS=[f'P_{i}' for i in range(1,31)]\nPRS=[f'PR_{i}' for i in range(1,61)]\nK=np.array([0.8]*3+[0.5]*4+[0.2]*7)\n\ncq=collections.defaultdict(lambda: np.zeros(NDAYS))\nfor (day,s,P),lst in consume.items():\n    for pr,qty in lst:\n        cq[(P,pr,s)][day-1]+=qty\ndef kc(c,b):\n    f=np.zeros(NDAYS)\n    for D0 in np.nonzero(c)[0]:\n        q=c[D0]\n        for j in range(1,15):\n            t=D0+j\n            if t<NDAYS: f[t]+=q*K[j-1]\n    return f/b\ndef build(P):\n    base=BASE[P]; resid=R[P]\n    active=[pr for pr in PRS if any((P,pr,s) in cq for s in STORES)]\n    ps=[]\n    for s in STORES:\n        Fs=np.column_stack([kc(cq.get((P,pr,s),np.zeros(NDAYS)),base[s]) for pr in active])\n        ps.append((Fs,(1.0-resid[s].values)))\n    return ps,active\ndef fit_uniq(Xs,Ys,nc):\n    X=np.vstack(Xs); y=np.concatenate(Ys)\n    coef,_=nnls(X,y); rss=np.sum((y-X@coef)**2); idx=np.arange(X.shape[1])\n    drops=np.zeros(nc)\n    for i in range(nc):\n        keep=idx[idx!=i]; cd,_=nnls(X[:,keep],y); drops[i]=np.sum((y-X[:,keep]@cd)**2)-rss\n    return coef[:nc],drops\n\nNDRAW=50\nout={}\nfor P in PRODUCTS:\n    ps,active=build(P); n=len(active)\n    Xs=[];Ys=[]\n    for Fs,y in ps:\n        m=~np.isnan(y); Xs.append(Fs[m]); Ys.append(y[m])\n    coef,drops=fit_uniq(Xs,Ys,n)\n    nullmax=[]; nullall=[]\n    for sd in range(NDRAW):\n        rng=random.Random(sd*101+ hash(P)%1000)\n        offs=[rng.randint(40,325) for _ in range(n)]\n        Xs2=[];Ys2=[]\n        for Fs,y in ps:\n            Fsh=np.column_stack([np.roll(Fs[:,i],offs[i]) for i in range(n)])\n            m=~np.isnan(y); {"type":"assistant","message":{"model":"claude-opus-4-8","id":"msg_018L7gKoN9oEm8tGG12FSq4H","type":"message","role":"assistant","content":[{"type":"tool_use","id":"toolu_01FVhKj6imL81ZN2vpxKjHKU","name":"Write","input":{"file_path":"/app/joint_als.py","content":"import pandas as pd, numpy as np, pickle, collections, random\nfrom scipy.optimize import nnls\ng=pd.read_pickle('/tmp/agg.pkl')\nconsume=pickle.load(open('/tmp/consume.pkl','rb'))['consume']\nNDAYS=365\nSTORES=[f'S_{i}' for i in range(1,11)]\nPRODUCTS=[f'P_{i}' for i in range(1,31)]\nPRS=[f'PR_{i}' for i in range(1,61)]\nK=np.array([0.8]*3+[0.5]*4+[0.2]*7)\n\n# demand matrix per product\ndef dmat(P):\n    sub=g[g.Product_ID==P].pivot(index='Day',columns='Store_ID',values='demand').sort_index().reindex(range(1,NDAYS+1))\n    return sub[STORES].values  # (365,10)\n\ncq=collections.defaultdict(lambda: np.zeros(NDAYS))\nfor (day,s,P),lst in consume.items():\n    for pr,qty in lst:\n        cq[(P,pr,s)][day-1]+=qty\ndef Gconv(c):\n    f=np.zeros(NDAYS)\n    for D0 in np.nonzero(c)[0]:\n        q=c[D0]\n        for j in range(1,15):\n            t=D0+j\n            if t<NDAYS: f[t]+=q*K[j-1]\n    return f\n\ndef build_G(P,active):\n    # G[pr] shape (365,10) units of recovery deficit (demand units)\n    G={}\n    for pr in active:\n        M=np.zeros((NDAYS,len(STORES)))\n        for si,s in enumerate(STORES):\n            M[:,si]=Gconv(cq.get((P,pr,s),np.zeros(NDAYS)))\n        G[pr]=M\n    return G\n\ndef fit_joint(P, niter=15):\n    D=dmat(P)  # (T,S)\n    active=[pr for pr in PRS if any((P,pr,s) in cq for s in STORES)]\n    G=build_G(P,active)\n    T,S=D.shape; nP=len(active)\n    Gstack=np.stack([G[pr] for pr in active],axis=2)  # (T,S,nP)\n    cal=np.ones(T)\n    base=np.nanmedian(D,axis=0)  # (S,)\n    x=np.zeros(nP)\n    valid=~np.isnan(D)\n    for it in range(niter):\n        # 1) given cal, solve base[s] and x jointly. Model: D[t,s]=base[s]*cal[t]-sum_pr x_pr*G[t,s,pr]\n        # Build one big system: unknowns = base[0..S-1], x[0..nP-1] (x>=0). base free sign but should be >0.\n        rows=[]; ys=[]\n        for s in range(S):\n            for t in range(T):\n                if not valid[t,s]: continue\n                r=np.zeros(S+nP)\n                r[s]=cal[t]\n                r[S:]=-Gstack[t,s,:]\n                rows.append(r); ys.append(D[t,s])\n        A=np.array(rows); b=np.array(ys)\n        # NNLS on all (base>=0 ok, x>=0).\n        sol,_=nnls(A,b)\n        base=sol[:S]; x=sol[S:]\n        # 2) given base,x, update cal[t]= sum_s base[s]*(D+sumGx)/sum base^2\n        num=np.zeros(T); den=0.0\n        adj=D + np.tensordot(Gstack,x,axes=([2],[0]))  # D + sum_pr x*G  (T,S)\n        for s in range(S):\n            col=adj[:,s]; m=valid[:,s]\n            num[m]+=base[s]*col[m]\n        den=np.sum(base**2)\n        cal=num/max(den,1e-9)\n        cal=cal/np.nanmean(cal)  # normalize\n    # final residual & per-producer unique contribution via dropping x_pr\n    pred=base[None,:]*cal[:,None]-np.tensordot(Gstack,x,axes=([2],[0]))\n    rss=np.nansum((D-pred)**2*valid)\n    return active,x,base,cal,Gstack,D,valid,rss\n\nresults={}\nfor P in PRODUCTS:\n    active,x,base,cal,Gstack,D,valid,rss=fit_joint(P)\n    order=np.argsort(-x)\n    top=[(active[i],round(x[i],3)) for i in order if x[i]>1e-3][:8]\n    results[P]=dict(active=active,x=x,base=base,cal=cal)\n    print(f'{P:5s} base~{np.round(base.mean(),0):.0f} x>0.01: {[(a,v) for a,v in top if v>0.01]}')\npickle.dump(results, open('/tmp/joint.pkl','wb'))\n"},"caller":{"type":"direct"}}],"stop_reason":null,"stop_sequence":null,"stop_details":null,"usage":{"input_tokens":2,"cache_creation_input_tokens":1289,"cache_read_input_tokens":170462,"cache_creation":{"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":1289,"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":0},"output_tokens":36,"service_tier":"standard","inference_geo":"global"},"context_management":null},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"65822cf6-c656-4a75-a87b-8b7ed7bc685a","uuid":"b1c75f18-dc99-40aa-83c1-8e2b564bb1e7","request_id":"req_011CberPq1xDw4UwWZ5g2ijr"}

nP=len(active)\n    Gstack=np.stack([G[pr] for pr in active],axis=2)  # (T,S,nP)\n    cal=np.ones(T)\n    base=np.nanmedian(D,axis=0)  # (S,)\n    x=np.zeros(nP)\n    valid=~np.isnan(D)\n    for it in range(niter):\n        # 1) given cal, solve base[s] and x jointly. Model: D[t,s]=base[s]*cal[t]-sum_pr x_pr*G[t,s,pr]\n        # Build one big system: unknowns = base[0..S-1], x[0..nP-1] (x>=0). base free sign but should be >0.\n        rows=[]; ys=[]\n        for s in range(S):\n            for t in range(T):\n                if not valid[t,s]: continue\n                r=np.zeros(S+nP)\n                r[s]=cal[t]\n                r[S:]=-Gstack[t,s,:]\n                rows.append(r); ys.append(D[t,s])\n        A=np.array(rows); b=np.array(ys)\n        # NNLS on all (base>=0 ok, x>=0).\n        sol,_=nnls(A,b)\n        base=sol[:S]; x=sol[S:]\n        # 2) given base,x, update cal[t]= sum_s base[s]*(D+sumGx)/sum base^2\n        num=np.zeros(T); den=0.0\n        adj=D + np.tensordot(Gstack,x,axes=([2],[0]))  # D + sum_pr x*G  (T,S)\n        for s in range(S):\n            col=adj[:,s]; m=valid[:,s]\n            num[m]+=base[s]*col[m]\n        den=np.sum(base**2)\n        cal=num/max(den,1e-9)\n        cal=cal/np.nanmean(cal)  # normalize\n    # final residual & per-producer unique contribution via dropping x_pr\n    pred=base[None,:]*cal[:,None]-np.tensordot(Gstack,x,axes=([2],[0]))\n    rss=np.nansum((D-pred)**2*valid)\n    return active,x,base,cal,Gstack,D,valid,rss\n\nresults={}\nfor P in PRODUCTS:\n    active,x,base,cal,Gstack,D,valid,rss=fit_joint(P)\n    order=np.argsort(-x)\n    top=[(active[i],round(x[i],3)) for i in order if x[i]>1e-3][:8]\n    results[P]=dict(active=active,x=x,base=base,cal=cal)\n    print(f'{P:5s} base~{np.round(base.mean(),0):.0f} x>0.01: {[(a,v) for a,v in top if v>0.01]}')\npickle.dump(results, open('/tmp/joint.pkl','wb'))\n","structuredPatch":[],"originalFile":null,"userModified":false}}

pandas as pd, numpy as np, pickle, collections, random\nfrom scipy.optimize import nnls\ng=pd.read_pickle('/tmp/agg.pkl')\nconsume=pickle.load(open('/tmp/consume.pkl','rb'))['consume']\nNDAYS=365\nSTORES=[f'S_{i}' for i in range(1,11)]\nPRODUCTS=[f'P_{i}' for i in range(1,31)]\nPRS=[f'PR_{i}' for i in range(1,61)]\nK=np.array([0.8]*3+[0.5]*4+[0.2]*7)\n\ncq=collections.defaultdict(lambda: np.zeros(NDAYS))\nfor (day,s,P),lst in consume.items():\n    for pr,qty in lst:\n        cq[(P,pr,s)][day-1]+=qty\ndef kc(c,b):\n    f=np.zeros(NDAYS)\n    for D0 in np.nonzero(c)[0]:\n        q=c[D0]\n        for j in range(1,15):\n            t=D0+j\n            if t<NDAYS: f[t]+=q*K[j-1]\n    return f/b\n\ndef get_demand_mat(P):\n    sub=g[g.Product_ID==P].pivot(index='Day',columns='Store_ID',values='demand').sort_index().reindex(range(1,NDAYS+1))\n    return sub[STORES]\n\ndef residuals(P, base_q=0.80, cal_agg='median'):\n    sub=get_demand_mat(P)\n    base=sub.quantile(base_q,axis=0)\n    norm=sub/base\n    cal=norm.median(axis=1) if cal_agg=='median' else norm.mean(axis=1)\n    for _ in range(3):\n        dc=sub.div(cal,axis=0)\n        exp=pd.DataFrame(np.outer(cal.values,base.values),index=sub.index,columns=sub.columns)\n {"type":"assistant","message":{"model":"claude-opus-4-8","id":"msg_01KGVxNmg1hqgZGEqHeSqNLU","type":"message","role":"assistant","content":[{"type":"tool_use","id":"toolu_01AahqZCrGBKxG5XDGLhNuNm","name":"Write","input":{"file_path":"/app/oos.py","content":"import pandas as pd, numpy as np, pickle, collections, random\nfrom scipy.optimize import nnls\ng=pd.read_pickle('/tmp/agg.pkl')\nconsume=pickle.load(open('/tmp/consume.pkl','rb'))['consume']\nRR=pickle.load(open('/tmp/resid.pkl','rb')); R=RR['resid']; BASE=RR['base']\nsets=pickle.load(open('/tmp/sets.pkl','rb'))['q80-median']\nNDAYS=365\nSTORES=[f'S_{i}' for i in range(1,11)]\nPRODUCTS=[f'P_{i}' for i in range(1,31)]\nPRS=[f'PR_{i}' for i in range(1,61)]\nK=np.array([0.8]*3+[0.5]*4+[0.2]*7)\nrandom.seed(3)\n\ncq=collections.defaultdict(lambda: np.zeros(NDAYS))\nfor (day,s,P),lst in consume.items():\n    for pr,qty in lst:\n        cq[(P,pr,s)][day-1]+=qty\ndef kc(c,b):\n    f=np.zeros(NDAYS)\n    for D0 in np.nonzero(c)[0]:\n        q=c[D0]\n        for j in range(1,15):\n            t=D0+j\n            if t<NDAYS: f[t]+=q*K[j-1]\n    return f/b\n\nTRAIN=set(range(0,240)); TEST=set(range(260,365))  # 20-day gap to avoid leakage\n\ndef regressors(P, prlist, shift=None, rng=None):\n    cols=[]\n    for pr in prlist:\n        per=[]\n        off=rng.randint(40,325) if shift else 0\n        for s in STORES:\n            f=kc(cq.get((P,pr,s),np.zeros(NDAYS)),BASE[P][s])\n            if shift: f=np.roll(f,off)\n            per.append(f)\n        cols.append(np.concatenate(per))\n    return np.column_stack(cols) if cols else np.zeros((NDAYS*len(STORES),0))\n\ndef yvec(P):\n    return np.concatenate([(1.0-R[P][s].values) for s in STORES])\n\ndef daymask():\n    # row index -> day index (0..364) per store block\n    return np.concatenate([np.arange(NDAYS) for _ in STORES])\n\ndm=daymask()\ntrainmask=np.array([d in TRAIN for d in dm])\ntestmask =np.array([d in TEST  for d in dm])\n\ntot_test_full=0.0; tot_test_none=0.0; tot_test_null=0.0; tot_test_ss=0.0\nper=[]\nfor P in PRODUCTS:\n    conf=sets[P]\n    y=yvec(P)\n    ytr=y[trainmask]; yte=y[testmask]\n    # baseline (no producers): predict mean train deficit\n    mu=np.nanmean(ytr)\n    rss_none=np.nansum((yte-mu)**2)\n    if conf:\n        X=regressors(P,conf)\n        Xtr=X[trainmask]; Xte=X[testmask]\n        # fit intercept+coefs via NNLS on [1,X] (allow intercept by centering)\n        A=np.column_stack([np.ones(Xtr.shape[0]),Xtr])\n        # nnls needs >=0; intercept can be >=0 (deficit mean>0). ok\n        coef,_=nnls(np.nan_to_num(A),np.nan_to_num(ytr))\n        Ate=np.column_stack([np.ones(Xte.shape[0]),Xte])\n        pred=Ate@coef\n        rss_full=np.nansum((yte-pred)**2)\n        # null: shifted regressors\n        rss_null=[]\n        for _ in range(20):\n            Xn=regressors(P,conf,shift=True,rng=random.Random(random.randint(0,1<<30)))\n            An=np.column_stack([np.ones(Xn[trainmask].shape[0]),Xn[trainmask]])\n            cn,_=nnls(np.nan_to_num(An),np.nan_to_num(ytr))\n            An_te=np.column_stack([np.ones(Xn[testmask].shape[0]),Xn[testmask]])\n            rss_null.append(np.nansum((yte-An_te@cn)**2))\n        rss_null=np.mean(rss_null)\n    else:\n        rss_full=rss_none; rss_null=rss_none\n    ss=np.nansum((yte-np.nanmean(yte))**2)\n    tot_test_full+=rss_full; tot_test_none+=rss_none; tot_test_null+=rss_null; tot_test_ss+=ss\n    per.append((P,conf,rss_none,rss_full,rss_null))\n\nprint('Out-of-sample (test days 261-365) total RSS:')\nprint(f'  no-producer baseline : {tot_test_none:.3f}')\nprint(f'  shifted-null model   : {tot_test_null:.3f}')\nprint(f'  CONFIRMED model      : {tot_test_full:.3f}')\nprint(f'  improvement of confirmed vs baseline: {100*(tot_test_none-tot_test_full)/tot_test_none:.2f}%')\nprint(f'  improvement of confirmed vs null    : {100*(tot_test_null-tot_test_full)/tot_test_null:.2f}%')\nprint()\nprint('Per-product OOS RSS reduction vs null (positive = confirmed predicts held-out better than shifted):')\nfor P,conf,rn,rf,rnull in per:\n    if conf:\n        red=100*(rnull-rf)/rnull\n        print(f'  {P:5s} {str(conf):24s} oos_gain_vs_null={red:+.2f}%')\n"},"caller":{"type":"direct"}}],"stop_reason":null,"stop_sequence":null,"stop_details":null,"usage":{"input_tokens":2,"cache_creation_input_tokens":2939,"cache_read_input_tokens":196341,"cache_creation":{"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":2939,"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":0},"output_tokens":42,"service_tier":"standard","inference_geo":"global"},"context_management":null},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"65822cf6-c656-4a75-a87b-8b7ed7bc685a","uuid":"7495e1b7-564b-4288-9792-03f41c6b6381","request_id":"req_011CbernKiyT5ykWSS2ingwk"}

tot_test_none=0.0; tot_test_null=0.0; tot_test_ss=0.0\nper=[]\nfor P in PRODUCTS:\n    conf=sets[P]\n    y=yvec(P)\n    ytr=y[trainmask]; yte=y[testmask]\n    # baseline (no producers): predict mean train deficit\n    mu=np.nanmean(ytr)\n    rss_none=np.nansum((yte-mu)**2)\n    if conf:\n        X=regressors(P,conf)\n        Xtr=X[trainmask]; Xte=X[testmask]\n        # fit intercept+coefs via NNLS on [1,X] (allow intercept by centering)\n        A=np.column_stack([np.ones(Xtr.shape[0]),Xtr])\n        # nnls needs >=0; intercept can be >=0 (deficit mean>0). ok\n        coef,_=nnls(np.nan_to_num(A),np.nan_to_num(ytr))\n        Ate=np.column_stack([np.ones(Xte.shape[0]),Xte])\n        pred=Ate@coef\n        rss_full=np.nansum((yte-pred)**2)\n        # null: shifted regressors\n        rss_null=[]\n        for _ in range(20):\n            Xn=regressors(P,conf,shift=True,rng=random.Random(random.randint(0,1<<30)))\n            An=np.column_stack([np.ones(Xn[trainmask].shape[0]),Xn[trainmask]])\n            cn,_=nnls(np.nan_to_num(An),np.nan_to_num(ytr))\n            An_te=np.column_stack([np.ones(Xn[testmask].shape[0]),Xn[testmask]])\n            rss_null.append(np.nansum((yte-An_te@cn)**2))\n        rss_null=np.mean(rss_null)\n    else:\n        rss_full=rss_none; rss_null=rss_none\n    ss=np.nansum((yte-np.nanmean(yte))**2)\n    tot_test_full+=rss_full; tot_test_none+=rss_none; tot_test_null+=rss_null; tot_test_ss+=ss\n    per.append((P,conf,rss_none,rss_full,rss_null))\n\nprint('Out-of-sample (test days 261-365) total RSS:')\nprint(f'  no-producer baseline : {tot_test_none:.3f}')\nprint(f'  shifted-null model   : {tot_test_null:.3f}')\nprint(f'  CONFIRMED model      : {tot_test_full:.3f}')\nprint(f'  improvement of confirmed vs baseline: {100*(tot_test_none-tot_test_full)/tot_test_none:.2f}%')\nprint(f'  improvement of confirmed vs null    : {100*(tot_test_null-tot_test_full)/tot_test_null:.2f}%')\nprint()\nprint('Per-product OOS RSS reduction vs null (positive = confirmed predicts held-out better than shifted):')\nfor P,conf,rn,rf,rnull in per:\n    if conf:\n        red=100*(rnull-rf)/rnull\n        print(f'  {P:5s} {str(conf):24s} oos_gain_vs_null={red:+.2f}%')\n","structuredPatch":[],"originalFile":null,"userModified":false}}
